transactions.desc: The Padres selected Rengifo's contract from Triple-A El Paso on Wednesday.
Tromp cleared outright waivers Wednesday and accepted an assignment to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies optioned Johnson to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Wednesday.
The Phillies reinstated Keller (forearm) from the injured list Wednesday.
The Angels designated Walton for assignment Wednesday.
The Angels activated Trout (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Flores from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Cardinals designated Shuster for assignment Wednesday.
The Cardinals selected Gastelum's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Wednesday.
The Phillies recalled Rangel from Triple-A Lehigh Valley to start Wednesday at Cincinnati in what's expected to be a bullpen game, Charlotte Varnes of The Athletic reports.
The Giants recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday.
The Mets designated Seelinger for assignment Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Myers from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Mets selected Curry's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Athletics optioned Muncy to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
The Athletics reinstated Soderstrom (hip) from the 10-day injured list, and he'll start at designated hitter and bat cleanup during Wednesday's game in Detroit.
Benson accepted an outright assignment to Triple-A Louisville after clearing waivers Wednesday.
The Brewers optioned Gasser to their rookie-level Arizona Complex League affiliate Wednesday.
The Cardinals optioned Dobbins to Triple-A Memphis on Wednesday.
Atlanta recalled Mederos from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta optioned Thomas to Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
The Mets designated Carrillo for assignment Tuesday.
The Blue Jays recalled Dallas from Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Blue Jays optioned Pinango to Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Cardinals designated Zimmermann for assignment before Game 2 of Tuesday's doubleheader against the Brewers.
The Cardinals selected Shuster's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Mauricio to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Padres optioned Jacob to Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Seelinger's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Brito from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
